label: Admin
info: Admin endpoints for Project: Caroline kiosk setup wizard.

label: Caroline - Settings Persistence
info: Loads ~/caroline/caroline_settings.json on startup and exposes POST /admin/save-settings, /admin/open-terminal, /admin/exit-kiosk

command: sh -lc 'export DISPLAY=${DISPLAY:-:0}; export WAYLAND_DISPLAY=${WAYLAND_DISPLAY:-wayland-0}; export XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=${XDG_RUNTIME_DIR:-/run/user/$(id -u)}; for t in xdg-terminal-exec gnome-terminal kgx konsole xfce4-terminal mate-terminal lxterminal xterm foot; do if command -v "$t" >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec "$t"; fi; done; exit 1'
name: open terminal
200 OK

command: pkill -f '[c]hromium.*--user-data-dir=.*/caroline/chromium-kiosk' || true; pkill -f '[c]hrome.*--user-data-dir=.*/caroline/chromium-kiosk' || true; pkill -f '[c]hromium.*--(kiosk|app=).*http://(localhost|127[.]0[.]0[.]1):8080' || true; pkill -f '[c]hrome.*--(kiosk|app=).*http://(localhost|127[.]0[.]0[.]1):8080' || true; pkill -f '[f]irefox-esr.*--kiosk.*http://(localhost|127[.]0[.]0[.]1):8080' || true; pkill -f '[f]irefox.*--kiosk.*http://(localhost|127[.]0[.]0[.]1):8080' || true
